Celebrating 50 Years of KPF

KPF50 Skyline Viewer

Use this AR app to identify all the KPF buildings visible from Edge!

  1. 1Tap Enter AR and allow camera access.
  2. 2Move the phone a moment, aim at the Empire State Building, and tap Align.
  3. 3Pan the skyline — tap any pin for project details.
This device/browser doesn't support WebXR AR. Open this page in Chrome on an Android phone. (iPhones/iPads need the native app — Safari has no WebXR.)

Real visual tracking on Android (ARCore, in Chrome) and iPhone/iPad (ARKit via Variant Launch — no app install, but Safari only, not Chrome or an in-app browser).

Made possible by KPF Applied Technology + Marketing
Edge, Hudson Yards
Step 1 — move the phone, then point at the Empire State Building and tap Align.
  1. 1Align on ESB
  2. 2Scan the skyline
  3. 3Tap pins — collect all 14!

Step 1 — Point here on the Empire State Building (where the stepped roofline meets the base of the spire), then tap Align.
